beats.title: Dreamworld Initiation
beats.boundaryReason: The session opens with Candrosa waking Kenzo before dawn, taking him to the mesa, and guiding him through the Dreamworld vision before the scene shifts back to the inn.
dateEvidence: The DM says this happens in the pre-dawn hours after the party has slept for half the night.
The session manifest sets drStart to 1748-03-30.

beats.title: Breakfast and Dream Reports
beats.boundaryReason: Back at the inn, Kenzo recounts the Dreamworld encounter over breakfast and the group starts comparing it to Karawa's fading protections and Candrosa's warnings.
dateEvidence: The recap says the group returned to the inn the same night and wakes to market sounds the next morning.
The breakfast scene follows directly from the pre-dawn vision without any day change.

beats.title: Raven's Hold Connections
beats.boundaryReason: The mesa discussion broadens into theories about Shakun, the Dreamworld, the sick halfling, and Raven's Hold, then ends once the party decides to visit Jasu and spend the next few days in town.
dateEvidence: This discussion continues directly from the same morning breakfast scene.
The DM says there are still several days before the council and festival contests.

beats.title: Jasu's Silver Spearpoints
beats.boundaryReason: After lunch the party visits Jasu, inspects Arcus's enchanted silver spearpoints, and confirms Arcus was hunting Great War relics before vanishing east.
dateEvidence: The DM explicitly says 'after lunch' the party heads to Jasu's shop.
The whole exchange is framed as the afternoon follow-up to the mesa conversation.

beats.title: Gifts, Book, and Staff Dancing
beats.boundaryReason: The next several days are handled as a montage: Delwath asks around town, the party receives gifts, Seeker gets the mysterious Runes of Creation book, and Kenzo wins the staff-dancing competition.
dateEvidence: The DM says the party has 'some number of days until the council' and then advances through town activities.
A later scene says the council is tomorrow after several days of preparation and festival events.
The manifest ends on 1748-04-04, so this montage falls between the opening day and the later festival finale.

beats.title: Rumors Before the Races
beats.boundaryReason: At the end of the day and into the following night, Delwath gathers rumors about winter travelers and Raven's Hold while the town's festival unease becomes more obvious before the axebeak contest.
dateEvidence: The DM frames this as the end of the same day after the festival montage and then sends the party to sleep.
The beat ends immediately before 'the day of the axebeak competition arrives.'

beats.title: Axebeak Contest and Scout Returns
beats.boundaryReason: The axebeak competition plays out, Wellby places in the standings, Alesh returns exhausted from scouting, and the party is summoned to the council the next morning.
dateEvidence: The beat begins when the DM says 'the day of the axebeak competition arrives.'
It ends with the party waking the next morning to Candrosa's council message.

beats.title: Council Alarms
beats.boundaryReason: The council convenes, Havdar and Alesh report the southern devastation and wider magical disorder, and the room reaches the first core question of whether Karawa should flee or stand.
dateEvidence: Candrosa's message says the council meets at 10 o'clock that morning.
This is the session-ending council referenced after the axebeak day.

beats.title: Arcus and Karawa's Choices
beats.boundaryReason: The party links Arcus to Raven's Hold and the Great War forts, then pushes the council to clarify the real options: defend Karawa, abandon it, or buy time while the town withdraws.
dateEvidence: This scene is a direct continuation of the same council meeting.
No break or day transition occurs before Kenzo moves from information-gathering into proposing a plan.

beats.title: Evacuation and New Missions
beats.boundaryReason: Kenzo's proposal hardens into council consensus: evacuate west under guard, fortify the temple, send for the king, scout south lightly, and have the party head north toward Raven's Hold.
dateEvidence: The beat begins with Kenzo explicitly offering a proposal to the council.
The meeting closes with Kisa setting the retreat in motion for the morning after the festival.
